title: Fantasy Mace Pack
description: This resource-pack overhauls the vanilla mace texture to make it into a fantasy mace.
body:
Fantasy Mace replaces the vanilla mace with a dark‑forged, gold‑crowned warhammer powered by a molten core.
This texture brings a mythic, high‑impact look to your combat without changing gameplay.
Features
- Detailed 1024x1024 fantasy‑style mace texture
- Blackened steel head with glowing emberlight core
- Gold spikes and reinforced handle accents
- Fully compatible with 1.21+ resource packs
Perfect for RPG servers, adventure maps, or players who want their weapons to feel legendary.
